title: The Captives Near Wax Death
description: On pages 14–17, the captives near wax death as luffy and Usopp push back against Baroque Works on Little Garden while Mr. 3’s wax execution threatens the crew and the giants.
scene: The Captives Near Wax Death. Luffy and Usopp push back against Baroque Works on Little Garden while Mr. 3’s wax execution threatens the crew and the giants. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fuhaha- haha! Yes, have a good taste of my candle service!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: FLICKER!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Flicker!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: That mist of wax sprinkling down on your heads will eventually turn you all into wax- figures!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: A perfect wax-human the likes of which even my sculpting skills can't create!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: You'll be wax-dolls with True Souls!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So give your lives up for the sake of beauty!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: No! Never!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Why do we have to become your artistic creations!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry?
dialogue.text: Brogy! Don't just lie still, do something!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: You're going to be turned into a wax-figure too, you know!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: A pretty big one to boot...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Hmph! It's futile no matter what you say to him, you see...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: for he only realized what had happened a moment ago...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Without realizing his friend was shouldering injuries,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: He killed that very friend whom he had been dwelling with for over a hundred years!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: He was so overjoyed he even shed tears of joy!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What a simpleton you are...! Or were those tears for the loss of your friend?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fuhahaha! Whatever it is, it's far too late for you to do anything about it, you imbecile!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I knew...! I knew from the moment I first swung my battle axe,

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: That Dorry was hiding something from me...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fuhahaha! You say you knew!? Haha, what lies you make!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Your violent blows didn't seem to bear the slightest amount of compassion or pity, I recall...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If so, then why did you not stop fighting?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: As if a dishonorable runt who doesn't even comprehend what duels are could ever understand the reason for my tears...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: What would you know...! You dare suggest that I dishonour a warrior who fights while hiding the pain he bears...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How could one show pity!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: To a warrior who goes to such lengths to fight!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But now I know what exactly he was hiding...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And because I now know, I shall settle everything with my own two hands!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: That is how I shall pay my due respects to my dear friend Dorry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uwahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Agh-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Chnon!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry?
dialogue.text: Brogy!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: what an annoyingly loud freak...!

summary: This part centers on the captives near wax death, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
